SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
Agent
Represents a participant in the publish-subscribe system that can listen to and publish messages.
Config
Common configuration lifecycle contract for loading, identifying, and closing a config.
ConfigValidator
Validates configuration text before it is loaded by GenericConfig.
ConfLoader
Loads computational graph configurations from uploaded files, creates topics and agents, and returns an HTML visualization.
GenericConfig
Loads computational graph configurations from files using reflection.
Graph
Represents a computational graph as a collection of nodes and edges.
HtmlGraphWriter
Creates an HTML/SVG visualization for a computational graph.
HtmlLoader
Serves static files (HTML, CSS, JavaScript) from a specified directory.
HTTPServer
HTTP server interface for handling web requests.
IncAgent
An agent that increments a numeric topic value by one.
Message
An immutable message object that can hold data as bytes, text, or numeric values.
MinAgent
An agent that subtracts the second numeric topic value from the first one.
MulAgent
An agent that multiplies two numeric topic values and publishes the result.
MyHTTPServer
Multi-threaded HTTP server implementation using a thread pool.
Node
A graph node that represents either a topic or an agent and stores outgoing edges.
ParallelAgent
Wraps an agent to handle callbacks asynchronously in a separate worker thread.
PlusAgent
An agent that adds two numeric topic values and publishes the result.
RequestParser
Parses HTTP requests from raw input streams.
RequestParser.RequestInfo
Contains parsed information from an HTTP request (method, URI, parameters, headers, body).
Servlet
Interface for handling HTTP requests and writing responses.
Topic
Represents a communication channel in the publish-subscribe system.
TopicDisplayer
Web interface for the publish-subscribe system.
TopicManagerSingleton
Thread-safe singleton providing access to the central topic manager.
TopicManagerSingleton.TopicManager
The actual topic manager that holds all topics.
